channel.title: Open Source Software on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source Software on Aman Ahuja

item.title: R2D3 and other letters and numbers
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: December 8, 2012.

Check out the alphabet soup of data web visualizations I am swimming in today.

  • R is statistical and computational software.

  • d3.js is a JavaScript library for building beautiful visualizations on the web. It uses scalable vector graphics (SVGs) directly from data through the document object model (DOM).
